<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after MOUSE split
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("All green objects:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")

print("\nAll charcoal objects:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'c':
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Agent position
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        print(f"\nAgent: Node {n['id']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Try clicking on node 13 (the new 26px green shape at rows 34-38, cols 42-47)
# Center is roughly row 36, col 44
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 44}])
print(f"\nAfter MOUSE on node 13: {last_action_result}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("\nGreen objects after MOUSE:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'N':

</parameter>
</function>
